title: anthoxanthum laxum
intro: Anthoxanthum laxum, also known as velvet grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, where it is believed to reduce inflammation and soothe the digestive tract. Velvet grass is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. It can be prepared as an infusion or tincture and is often used to ease symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, dyspepsia, and other gastrointestinal disorders.
